feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cost allocation on basis of production quantity in SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Client has a requirement to allocate costs based on quantity produced in the system. Are there any options to enable this? 

In addition, would like to know if there are any enhancement capabilities for the cost allocation process in SAP public cloud?

entry.title: NOT ABLE TO POST PO FOR NLAG MATERIALS
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

kindly suggest me on this not able to post a po for NLAG material now, but usually able to post previously ..

this is the error which showed .

 

Regards,

zareena

entry.title: Is there any API in sap public cloud to read the full Journal Entry XML data?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to read existing JE XML data that were created manually by users, in order to customize an external system to send customized JE to SAP Public Cloud version.

However in SAP Business Accelerator Hub portal, I only find APIs that allow me to read JE item data and not the full JE document. These are some API that I tested and only allow me to read JE item data:

API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV
API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV
API_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM

Isn't there any API to read a specific JE XML full structure?

I was wondering if I could use other APIs to update existing JE like JOURNALENTRYBULKCHANGEREQUEST and then I could get the full JE XML in the response...

Please help!

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to pass Sale Order discount condition value to PO discount condition value
entry.content:
Even after clicking on 'update' in PO conditions tab for updating the custom condition type for discount you are only getting the value from Sales orders condition record and not the changed value in sales order's Respective condition type.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Needed report - on G/L accounts that have been renamed -
entry.content:
Needed report - on G/L accounts that have been renamed -


Hi all,

Can anyone help?

Is there an app that can be used to create a report showing where G/L accounts have been renamed?

The customer needs a list with the old and new names. In the ‘Manage G/L account master data’ app and also in the ‘Manage chart of accounts’ app, there is no field that can be displayed as a filter. You can only check the G/L accounts individually in the Manage G/L account master data app.

Thank you in advance.

Best regards
N.S.

entry.title: eInvoice Romania - Configuring INVOICE_TYPE_CODE_SD for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
eInvoice Romania - how to map INVOICE_TYPE_CODE_SD to external values?

entry.title: Need to get memo text from Interest Rate Instrument
entry.content:
We need to retrieve the memo text values from the Interest Rate Instrument. See attached.

I found that standard app is using the function module READ_TEXT but this object not a released api.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Missing position flows for withholding tax.
entry.content:
How to configure position flows of withholding tax.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to avoid a purchase requisition for a material on stock
entry.content:
Dear community,

we are using app F1639A - My purchase requisitions to manually create P/Rs for non production material. In many cases existing material on stock in the warehouse will be requested. This creates unnecessary efforts in procurement to recognize the material on stock or will result in superfluous material in the warehouse. 

From a process point of view users should first look into the app F1076 Stock - Single Material, but this is usually not done.

Will it be possible to display the Unrestricted-Use Stock in the app F1636A next to the Quantity Requested? How can I do this? I did not find any possibility in the adapt UI for the app.

Or even better, will it be possible to start an ATP check to show the material on stock or delivery time similar to the ATP check in a sales quotation?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Integration of Work instructions from S4-Public to SAP DM
entry.content:
Hi, we were able to import work instructions from ERP to SAP Digital Manufacturing (DM) as PRT-type documents in on-premise environments. However, we couldn't find this option in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Is there a way to include work instructions in S/4HANA Public Cloud and send them to SAP DM? 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: refresh the system with Data and take the Configuration
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

for Quality Environment, can the Client refresh the S4HANA Public System so that they can clear all the data loaded and just keep the configuration??

Thanks,

TQM

entry.title: SAP BTP React app - CSRF token validation failed - during POST to Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm a little but stuck. Hope you can help, here is the case:

I'm currently working on a application which fetches data from the backend, and posts new entries to custom business object using API calls. 

I've wrote the application in React, using SAP BAS to deploy it to SAP BTP on CF. 

I use the xsuaa service, bind it to my app, and have login feature to start the application.

I use a destination service and connect it through the destination to S4Hana Public Cloud with the comm user (yes, I tried oauth2samlbearer but somehow I can't get it to work (anyone got a guide? 😉 ) ). It is bound to the service.

When I fetch data, all works fine, it fetches process order information.

I do some stuff with the orders, and the results should be send to S4Hana Public cloud, to a business object which is exposed. 

So I fetch the X-CSRF-Token (is getting fetched), pass this to the post including payload, and.....it fails with the 403 error that my csrf token validation failed. 

The things I checked already:

The authentication is always set to true, so the cookie handling should be done by the browser:

const getAxiosConfig = () => { return { withCredentials: true, }; };

When I try to do this manually (getting the cookies and combining them), the cookies are not exposed do to security reason. Pretty sure it is not advised to do so btw

export const createProcessOrderSet = async (payload) => {
  const local = "/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROCESSORDERS_CDS/YY1_PROCESSORDERS";
  const destination = "/destination/S4H_BACKEND/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROCESSORDERS_CDS/YY1_PROCESSORDERS";
  const url = process.env.NODE_ENV === "production" ? destination : local;
  const config = { withCredentials: true };

  // Log URL for debugging
  console.log("Using URL:", url);

  try {
    // Fetch CSRF token via GET request
    const csrfResponse = await axios.get(`${url}?$top=1`, {
      ...config,
      headers: {
        "X-CSRF-Token": "Fetch",
        Accept: "application/json",
      },
    });

    // Retrieve CSRF token using both lower and proper case header names
    const csrfToken = csrfResponse.headers["x-csrf-token"] || csrfResponse.headers["X-Csrf-Token"];
    if (!csrfToken) {
      throw new Error("CSRF Token not received from SAP");
    }
    console.log("CSRF Token:", csrfToken);

    // Rely on the browser's cookie management (withCredentials) for session cookies
    // No manual Cookie header is set here.

    // Perform the POST request using the CSRF token
    const postResponse = await axios.post(url, payload, {
      ...config,
      headers: {
        "X-CSRF-Token": csrfToken,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        "Accept": "application/json",
      },
    });

    return postResponse.data;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(" Error creating process order set:", error);
    throw error;
  }
};

When I do all this locally using a proxy in my app, the posting and stuff just works fine. It looks like the destination is the issue I think, but even that is not something unfamiliar. Any hints or tips regarding the destination or the destination services? I searched of course but notes and hints are mostly targeted at onprem/private cloud. The manual cookies didn't work, no authentication didn't work, the only difference is the destination, but the fetch of data (standard api's) do work, except for the post.

Anything would help 🙂

Cheers!

Laurens

entry.title: How to change end date of a work agreement during transfer situation in manage workforce
entry.content:
Rehiring does not work as expected and the end date is not changed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The cash flow is not generated automatically
entry.content:
What are the additional settings are required to enable automatic generation of cash flows?

We confirmed that executing the Flow Builder job manually via "Schedule Jobs for Flow Builder" works as expected.
In the Starter System, the cash flow is generated automatically without any issues.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Slow GOS export via CMIS interface (BTP / Document Management)
entry.content:
We connected an external Document Management System (DMS) via CMIS interface (BTP / Document Management).

But we receive SAP GOS documents only every 8 hours in the external file system.File attachments are transferred in real time. I can see them in the file system right after attaching them in SAP.

How can we accelerate the export of GOS documents to see them in real time in the external file system?

Is it possible to export GOS documents every 10 Minutes or faster?

entry.content:
How to transport a G/L Account to a PROD Tenant?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Output multiple instructions all at once (download multiple instructions as a PDF all at once)
entry.content:
Regarding PDF output of manufacturing instructions, is there a way to output them all at once (download multiple instructions as a PDF all at once)?
I understand that  select and output individual instructions in the manufacturing instruction inquiry (CO03).
To output multiple instructions, I need to repeat this process, so I was wondering if it would be possible to output them all at once.I would appreciate it if you could tell me about the relevant application, possible operation plans, past operation examples, etc.

entry.title: Retention Period of PDF Attachments (on Journal Entries and Supplier Invoices)
entry.content:
Hi,

Our client requested some clarity on the default retention policy in S/4 Public Cloud.
Specifically for PDF's that are attached onto Journal Entries and or Supplier Invoices

They want to know if they need to print all documents or if they can leave it within S/4. 
They need to know if the auditors can find back all the attachments within S/4 or if they should look through paperwork.

I looked around, but did not find the requested information. all help is much appreciated!

Thanks in advance
Matthias

entry.title: About scope items for material closing period(MMPV)
entry.content:
Dear [SAP Team/SAP Support],

Which scope item does the material closing period (MMPV) function apply to?
Until version 2402, it was listed in the scope item BEI (period end processing plant),but it seems to have been discontinued when version 2408 was released.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: purchasing view data master data
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

I would know is there any possibility of comparing master data between two company codes as we are using public cloud I am not aware how can it be comparable. kindly suggest me any leads would be appreciated.

scenario :

we have 2 company codes wanted to test the purchasing view for both company codes in materials to compare and harmonize same for both company codes.
